title: angelica edulis
intro: Angelica edulis, also known as the edible angelica, is a perennial plant species within the carrot family that is native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica edulis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried roots that can be used to make soups or added to traditional Chinese medicines.
